title: FLOSS Weekly 453: libgit2
summary:
Edward Thomson is the maintainer of the libgit2 project, which provides a linkable library for low-level management of Git repositories. The project is a portable, pure C implementation of the Git core methods provided as a re-entrant linkable library with a solid API,
Download or subscribe to this show at https://twit.tv/shows/floss-weekly
Here's what's coming up for FLOSS in the future.
Think your open source project should be on FLOSS Weekly? Email Randal at merlyn@stonehenge.com
